Compliance.description: CMS registered restricted scheme (professionals only); strong compliance track; no major issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3.11/5 (mixed); limited reviews but balanced positive/negative. Member award recognition.

Product Value.description: 7 plans; competitive for professional market; strong hospital/specialist cover; savings accounts.

Innovation.description: Digital claims, app access, wellness programs, chronic management; above-average for restricted scheme.

Customer Support.description: Direct scheme support; positive member manager service; some complaints on response times.

Accessibility & Security.description: Restricted to professionals but good digital access; POPIA compliance assumed; no major incidents.

socialSentiment.summary: Positive professional community reputation; limited social media; HelloPeter balanced.
